title: Iterators 2
description: The `collect()` method consumes an iterator and collects results into a collection.
instructions: Use iterator methods and collect to transform strings.
hints: Use `.to_uppercase()` on a char to get an iterator of uppercase chars.
Chain the uppercase first char with the remaining chars.
explanation: The `collect()` method transforms an iterator into a collection. You often need to specify the target type with turbofish syntax: `collect::<String>()`. The `chars()` method creates an iterator over a string's characters. `char::to_uppercase()` returns an iterator because some characters map to multiple uppercase characters (like the German eszett).
